name: About
author: Empty
description: A friendly about widget to get you started with Blank Board.

name: Layout Engine
author: Dheeraz
description: Advanced layout engine with column presets, resizers, and drag-to-zone support.

name: Clock Widget
author: Dheeraz
description: Beautiful analog & digital clock widget with multiple styles.

name: Notes Widget
author: Dheeraz
description: Quick sticky notes with auto-save and rich text support.

name: Sample Theme
author: Dheeraz
description: A sample theme plugin to demonstrate how to create and apply custom themes in Blank Board.

name: Music Player
author: Dheeraz
description: A music player plugin with playlist support.

name: Plugin Builder
author: Dheeraz
description: A plugin builder to help you create your own plugins for Blank Board.

name: Plugin Manager Enhancer
author: Dheeraz
description: Advanced plugin manager with grid/list views, search, active/paused categories, and polished community store.

name: Pomodoro Timer
author: Dheeraz
description: Focus timer with 25-min work sessions and 5-min breaks. Tracks completed sessions.

name: Calculator
author: Dheeraz
description: A sleek calculator with basic arithmetic operations and expression display.

name: Todo List
author: Dheeraz
description: Manage tasks with auto-save, completion tracking, and event bus integration.

name: Color Picker
author: Dheeraz
description: Pick colors with RGB sliders and copy hex values to clipboard.

name: Stopwatch
author: Dheeraz
description: Precision stopwatch with start/stop, lap tracking, and centisecond display.

name: Dice Roller
author: Dheeraz
description: Roll polyhedral dice (d4-d100) with roll history tracking.

name: Countdown Timer
author: Dheeraz
description: Set custom countdowns with hours, minutes, and seconds. Notifies when done.

name: Random Quotes
author: Dheeraz
description: Get inspired with random quotes from famous thinkers and developers.

name: Unit Converter
author: Dheeraz
description: Convert between length, weight, temperature, and speed units.

name: Markdown Previewer
author: Dheeraz
description: Write and preview Markdown with split-view editing and syntax highlighting.

name: JSON Formatter
author: Dheeraz
description: Format, validate, and syntax-highlight JSON with minify and copy support.

name: Base64 Encoder
author: Dheeraz
description: Encode and decode Base64 strings with a clean split-panel interface.

name: Password Generator
author: Dheeraz
description: Generate secure passwords with customizable length, character types, and strength meter.

name: Text Counter
author: Dheeraz
description: Count words, characters, lines, sentences, and estimate reading time.

name: Emoji Keyboard
author: Dheeraz
description: Browse and copy emojis by category with a searchable grid interface.

name: Drawing Canvas
author: Dheeraz
description: Freehand drawing with pen/eraser, color palette, and adjustable brush size.

name: Kanban Board
author: Dheeraz
description: Drag-and-drop task management with To Do, In Progress, and Done columns.

name: Daily Planner
author: Dheeraz
description: Plan your day hour by hour with event creation and current-time highlighting.

name: World Clock
author: Dheeraz
description: View live times across multiple cities and timezones with auto-refresh.

name: Dark Theme
author: Dheeraz
description: Apply a sleek dark theme to the entire board with subtle grid lines.

name: Rollback Manager
author: Dheeraz
description: Version rollback for plugins with confirmation dialog. Injects rollback buttons into Plugin Manager.

name: Logger
author: Dheeraz
description: Records plugin lifecycle events. Adds a Logs button to Plugin Manager.
